name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: the most important question we can ask:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time. |
---
Peter --

Later this month, we'll mark 100 days left to Election Day. **That 's right, we're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time.**

Much of the latest polling has Joe _SURGING_ in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of the general election, but the truth is, we can't take anything for granted. Not a single vote.

We're already starting to lay down our Get Out the Vote plans in key swing states, and working to collect as much voter information as possible. And because we're knocking fewer doors right now to practice safe social distancing, digital outreach is all the more important.

[So we're setting a goal to collect 2143 responses from Pennsylvania to our latest poll. Peter, can you represent Pennsylvania today and tell us if you plan to vote for Joe Biden this fall?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c7/700850766/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS") __ __| __| __ **DO YOU PLAN TO VOTE FOR JOE BIDEN THIS FALL IN PENNSYLVANIA?**

| | [YES >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c7/700850766/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
| [NO >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c7/700850766/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
| [UNDECIDED >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c7/700850766/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
__
__
__
Even if you've answered a similar poll for us before, it's important that we get an updated response from you, Peter. **Which is why we hope you 'll be one of the 2143 people we need from Pennsylvania to respond.**

Like we said -- no vote is taken for granted on this campaign. Joe and the rest of our team are going to continue to work our hearts out over these final four months to earn every last vote, and win this battle for the soul of the nation.

We want to be conscious of your time, so we've made this poll real quick. **Peter, click below to begin our new supporter poll and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe in Pennsylvania this fall:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/vote-for-joe-in#Pennsylvania](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c7/700850766/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Thanks for your time and for your support,

Joe Biden 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c6/700850766/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c5/700850766/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c4/700850766/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c3/700850766/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c2/700850766/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c1/700850766/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c0/700850766/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36bf/700850766/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36be/700850766/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36bd/700850766/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36c0/700850766/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36bc/700850766/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36bf/700850766/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf67/1cd0ac28/8b06cb1d/357c36bb/700850766/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Abigail Sigler
subject: I can't believe it's been a year already
body:
It's been one year since President Trump tweeted his endorsement of Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate.
Peter,It's been one year since President Trump tweeted his endorsement of Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate.To celebrate, we put together a video recapping all the incredible moments in our campaign thus far. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Hi there!

I’m Eugene’s Deputy Finance Director, and it’s great to meet you! I am so proud to be on Team Eugene, and I know that together, we can really shake up the status quo here in South Central PA.

**I just logged off our weekly finance meeting, and it looks like we’re running behind where we should be at this point in the month.** Our last fundraising quarter was _amazing_ (_thank you!_), but with special interest groups already committing millions of dollars to keep this district in Republican hands, we can’t let up on our efforts one bit. **[I’ve heard such incredible things about this grassroots team, so I wanted to come to you directly to see if you could help us raise $7,000 by Wednesday to get us back on track. Can you chip in $10 (_for PA-10!_) or more right now to ensure we reach this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18235056/221868026/462758527?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.13_b1_ag_all-nd&refcode2=1aebca8d-18c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWViY2E4ZC0xOGM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_ZjL53Sx_gk5pHass8of2tRbm52Fnbs6sIz6VQKyBw=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18235057/221868027/462758527?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.13_b1_ag_all-nd&refcode2=1aebca8d-18c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWViY2E4ZC0xOGM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_ZjL53Sx_gk5pHass8of2tRbm52Fnbs6sIz6VQKyBw=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18235058/221868028/462758527?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.07.13_b1_ag_all-nd&refcode2=1aebca8d-18c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWViY2E4ZC0xOGM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_ZjL53Sx_gk5pHass8of2tRbm52Fnbs6sIz6VQKyBw=)

**The kind of special interest influence our opponent is relying on to win this race is everything that’s wrong with Washington, but I know this grassroots team has what it takes to fight back.** With the latest polls showing a _very_ close race --**_Eugene is within just three points of Scott Perry!_** \-- we have a real chance to flip this seat blue.

[**Anything you can contribute now -- even if it’s just a dollar or two -- will go a long way towards helping us defeat Scott Perry and his special interest backers in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18235064/221868034/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.13_b1_ag_all-nd&refcode2=1aebca8d-18c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWViY2E4ZC0xOGM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_ZjL53Sx_gk5pHass8of2tRbm52Fnbs6sIz6VQKyBw=) [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18235065/221868035/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.13_b1_ag_all-nd&refcode2=1aebca8d-18c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWViY2E4ZC0xOGM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_ZjL53Sx_gk5pHass8of2tRbm52Fnbs6sIz6VQKyBw=)

Thank you so much!

Alexis

_Alexis Gonzaludo
Deputy Finance Director

I am so proud to be on Team Eugene, and I know that together, we can really shake up the status quo here in South Central PA. I just logged off our weekly finance meeting, and it looks like we’re running behind where we should be at this point in the month. Our last fundraising quarter was amazing (thank you!), but with special interest groups already committing millions of dollars to keep this district in Republican hands, we can’t let up on our efforts one bit. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = The kind of special interest influence our opponent is relying on to win this race is everything that’s wrong with Washington, but I know this grassroots team has what it takes to fight back. With the latest polls showing a very close race --Eugene is within just three points of Scott Perry! \-- we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. = = Thank you so much! Alexis Alexis Gonzaludo Deputy Finance Director Eugene for Congress Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. Chip in any amount to help Eugene flip PA-10 blue in one of the most competitive races in the entire country. | = | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items: Thank President Trump, Civics for Kids, & More
body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, JULY 13TH @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyMzYxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=tH5LiZwVo6Qi_3TpN6ytIw) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDIzNjEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=jlvBOqiNyA6AKpwc77Xwsg) | |
---
This week, we are working to reopen schools in the fall, bringing real civics back to American kids, supporting President Trump, and telling the Senate to help Americans get back to work instead of helping the Democrats keep the economy shuttered.
|
---
**Reopening Schools**
Last week, after a month of activism by you – the grassroots – the White House held a major event on reopening schools, including a roundtable event with President Trump. I had the honor of representing you at this event and at the roundtable, and giving your message directly to the President, face-to-face.

Now we need to thank President Trump and show him he has support, because the media immediately attacked him for saying that schools must reopen in the fall.

First, share this tweet thanking President Trump.
COPY AND PASTE: [https://twitter.com/jennybethm/status/1280862440226463747](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qZW5ueWJldGhtL3N0YXR1cy8xMjgwODYyNDQwMjI2NDYzNzQ3P21pZD00MjM2MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=mIta9Wmyl_mnVkZvQYFpZQ)
[FACEBOOK](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%&K=ZvV-GkKSEjcfRwhnSywnuw)
[TWITTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvcmV0d2VldD90d2VldF9pZD0xMjgwODYyNDQwMjI2NDYzNzQ3Jm1pZD00MjM2MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=yL519XgYv994Y7pCZRCGQw)
[EMAIL](mailto:?subject=Thank President Trump for trying to reopen schools! &body=Thank President Trump for trying to reopen schools! Body: Please help me publicly thank President Trump by either emailing this link to others, posting it on your own social media accounts if you have any, or both! Thank you! https://twitter.com/jennybethm/status/1280862440226463747)
Second, email the White House and to let President Trump know you support his efforts to reopen schools. [Use this form to contact the White House.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvY29udGFjdC8_bWlkPTQyMzYxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=GI0dWaj02cNyB3DZ8QQzqg)
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again**
We all understand that schools need to reopen. However, we also know that public schools have fallen very short of teaching our children proper civics for many years. That’s why Tea Party Patriots is going to be suggesting weekly resources and ideas for parents and grandparents to use over the summer and even as school begins again to help you ensure that your children or grandchildren understand and appreciate our founding and our country.

This week, we are recommending reading the Declaration of Independence with your kids or grandkids, as well as having them repeat the first 100 words back to you (in chunks) as part of teaching them to memorize this part of the Declaration.

[You can view a copy of the Declaration of Independence here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtd29yZHByZXNzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMTMvMDYvRGVjbGFyYXRpb25PZkluZGVwZW5kZW5jZS5wZGY_bWlkPTQyMzYxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=UCwYG08fkpg6NAyoTDxx-A)

Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

Lastly, if you want to read about how the left has corrupted civics, and what to keep an eye out for in the schools your children or grandchildren attend, [read this report from the National Association of Scholars about civics education](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmFzLm9yZy9yZXBvcnRzL21ha2luZy1jaXRpemVucy1ob3ctYW1lcmljYW4tdW5pdmVyc2l0aWVzLXRlYWNoLWNpdmljcz9taWQ9NDIzNjEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=OIFXFkvsaNUgrxpRXWdYXQ). While the report focuses mostly on higher education, they also discuss how this has trickled down to K-12.
|
---
**Call & Email Both of Your Senators**
We need to continue to put pressure on the Senate to reject any extension of the supplemental unemployment payment of $600/week, and instead, to pass a payroll tax suspension for the rest of the year.

It doesn’t matter if your Rep. or your Senators are Republicans or Democrats. The same message goes to all of them.
* Tell them to **vote NO on any effort to extend the supplemental unemployment payments** beyond July 31.
* Tell them to **vote YES on a payroll tax suspension for the rest of the year** , so that Americans can get back to work and get a raise!
* Send the Wall Street Journal article to your Representative and your Senators. They all most likely have a subscription and can read the full article. You will probably have to go to their official government websites and use their online contact forms rather than actual email. Here is the link: [https://www.wsj.com/articles/a-true-economic-stimulus-plan-11593728372](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9hLXRydWUtZWNvbm9taWMtc3RpbXVsdXMtcGxhbi0xMTU5MzcyODM3Mj9taWQ9NDIzNjEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Bu5184o-F-uPC4haN3D-BQ)

|
---
**Share President Trump’s Independence Day Speech**
If you haven’t shared the President’s speech from Mount Rushmore yet, please do so! People in your sphere of influence need to see or read it for themselves, rather than trusting what the mainstream media has said.

**Highlights Video from Mount Rushmore on July 3rd:**
[https://youtu.be/z_LkIA_Oeus](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS96X0xrSUFfT2V1cz9taWQ9NDIzNjEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1mHpxG25q_FGczU5GqC2PA)

**Transcript of President Trump’s Remarks from Mount Rushmore on July 3rd:**
[https://www.newsmax.com/us/mount-rushmore-speech-transcript-july-3/2020/07/04/id/975688](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV3c21heC5jb20vdXMvbW91bnQtcnVzaG1vcmUtc3BlZWNoLXRyYW5zY3JpcHQtanVseS0zLzIwMjAvMDcvMDQvaWQvOTc1Njg4P21pZD00MjM2MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=coAdUzN-b2XbaqTZZnZfVA)

**Video of President Trump’s Remarks from Mount Rushmore on July 3rd:**
[https://youtu.be/mXD4zPY4Ai0](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTk1LTliOGZmYjk2N2MyZTQyODZhZjEzYTA4MDZmYjUyYzBi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9tWEQ0elBZNEFpMD9taWQ9NDIzNjEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=LocRSf0lAggaGdYQNZyYrw)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

name: Mike Espy
subject: Add your name to demand Congress pass no-excuse early voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18238887/221937945/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNkNWU5NC0zMWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhQPd9pQzj_iQTZEV5g32StcLZ8FyqBl6-isY2fafd4=&emci=28cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=29cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Discouraging people from voting by mail, or refusing to make it an option for every voter during a dangerous pandemic, is a modern day form of voter suppression. I believe we ought to be clear about that. As we speak, far-right leaders are pushing flat-out lies about the safety of voting by mail, trying to use this public health crisis as an excuse to make voting harder. We saw what happened in Wisconsin and Georgia this spring, where voters were forced to wait in hours-long lines at a very limited number of polling places: People were forced to choose between their health or their Constitutional right and duty to vote. We can’t let that happen here in Mississippi or other communities across the country come November, especially now with coronavirus cases surging. **We need leaders in Washington to pass a no-excuse early voting option for every voter in this country, now.** [**Join me in demanding Congress pass no-excuse early voting: Add your name to my petition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18238888/221937946/2063312380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNkNWU5NC0zMWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhQPd9pQzj_iQTZEV5g32StcLZ8FyqBl6-isY2fafd4=&emci=28cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=29cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18238889/221937947/2063312380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNkNWU5NC0zMWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhQPd9pQzj_iQTZEV5g32StcLZ8FyqBl6-isY2fafd4=&emci=28cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=29cd5e94-31c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
This is going to be one of the most important elections in our lifetimes — and we’re building something historic here in Mississippi. We need to make it as easy and safe as possible for every voter to make their voice heard.
Thanks for all you do.
– Mike

clean_body: | Discouraging people from voting by mail, or refusing to make it an option for every voter during a dangerous pandemic, is a modern day form of voter suppression. I believe we ought to be clear about that. As we speak, far-right leaders are pushing flat-out lies about the safety of voting by mail, trying to use this public health crisis as an excuse to make voting harder. We saw what happened in Wisconsin and Georgia this spring, where voters were forced to wait in hours-long lines at a very limited number of polling places: People were forced to choose between their health or their Constitutional right and duty to vote. We can’t let that happen here in Mississippi or other communities across the country come November, especially now with coronavirus cases surging. We need leaders in Washington to pass a no-excuse early voting option for every voter in this country, now. | | This is going to be one of the most important elections in our lifetimes — and we’re building something historic here in Mississippi. We need to make it as easy and safe as possible for every voter to make their voice heard. Thanks for all you do. – Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

body:
What happens right here on Florida’s Suncoast could determine if we keep the House majority and if Florida finally swings blue in November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239980/221948394/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=&emci=27bc2f15-01c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=1016750b-35c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Team,

Just wanted to be sure you saw Margaret’s note from a few days ago. What happens right here on Florida’s Suncoast could determine if we keep the House majority and if Florida finally swings blue in November.

If we turn out enough voters to flip this seat, we can also ensure Florida’s electoral votes don’t go to Donald Trump. By helping our campaign, you’re investing in progress for every corner of our state.

**[This is our first mid-month goal of this quarter — please, can you support our momentum with a sustaining contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239981/221948395/1073285021?refcode=em07132020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=)**

Thanks,

Alex

**\-- Forwarded Message --**

Friends,

You may remember, a few weeks ago Vice President Pence was planning yet another visit to this District — it wasn’t his first visit here, and it certainly won’t be his last.

And that’s no coincidence. Our District and our state are key to President Trump winning re-election, that’s why the Republican convention is scheduled to be an in-person event in our state — it’s a last-ditch effort to host a publicity stunt that puts the lives of Floridians in danger. This means keeping up our momentum is more important than ever.

**[That’s why we need you — if we can get 200 grassroots donors to step up before our mid-month deadline, I know we can stay on track for July. Please — make a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239982/221948396/1073285021?refcode=em07132020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=)**

I’m proud of the campaign we’re running, and am grateful to have supporters like you with me in this work.

Thank you,

Margaret | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239983/221948397/1073285021?refcode=em07132020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239984/221948398/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18239985/221948399/192916899?contactdata=fAtlutqw%2Fkyw67cLJKALao6VfEcmgrqSA5mARb8lbA%2Be25jMZ3JXWoo8jlAh4DrC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=&emci=27bc2f15-01c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=1016750b-35c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/27bc2f15-01c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/1016750b-35c5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDE2NzUwYi0zNWM1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZnZB7GaJpdBRy272yRgx7KGOpCREnxfafCzx0RCWAo=&id=113801977) .

name: Bill Olson
subject: Why do they hate so much?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gkGkrJvf0_6OuRU&b=nvREpyleXKWhfjdeJzvmlA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gkGkrJvf0_6OuRU&b=nvREpyleXKWhfjdeJzvmlA

I am a Christian. As a Christian, we are taught to love, even your enemies.

That is why I don't understand the blind hatred the Democrats seem to have these days- against our country, against our history, against our very citizens!

Consider the actions of the Dems just in the last few weeks:

-Tearing down historical statues, even when it's illegal to do so. In Portland, mobs tore down statues of George Washington and Thomas Jefferson; in Richmond, Governor "Radical Ralph" Northam has torn down many statues along the city's famous Monument Ave. The DNC even came out swinging against historic Mt. Rushmore! It clearly doesn't matter if they are confederate statues or not; it's America they hate!

-Abolishing the police, depriving citizens of needed protection against violent crime. Look at what Joe Biden has now embraced:

It's clear Joe Biden's far left advisers are starting to change his stance on policing in America.

During an interview Wednesday with leftist publication This Now, Biden said the police are over militarized, have "become the enemy" and said funding should "absolutely" be reallocated elsewhere. In other words, he's advocating for the defunding of law enforcement as crime across the country continues to skyrocket.

-Depriving us of our Constitutionally-guaranteed rights, including our freedom of speech and freedom to worship.

The U.S. Constitution is also being tested in unprecedented ways, with religious leaders from Mississippi to Kentucky to San Diego County suing their governments, asserting that they are being treated differently from businesses that can remain open, such as supermarkets and liquor stores.

What is most disturbing is that the Supreme Court has backed California's restrictions on Freedom of Worship.

-Condoning violence by mobs.

House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"—in the wake of George Floyd's death.

The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."

Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."

name: Sandy Smith
subject: They hate police, I don't.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get. I will fight for the rule of law!
I can't believe there are Democrat mayors and governors who are excusing the violent rioters- and, in fact, encouraging them!
It's not just one or two. The entire Democrat caucus in Congress approves of, and encourages, the violent rioters!
How do we know this?
_**House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"** —in the wake of George Floyd's death._
_The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."_
_Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."_
_No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure._
[What do I need to convince you of the hopelessness of the Democrats](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting.
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)
---

**_My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. _**

_In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city._

_Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed._

Dozens of violent shootings. An eight year old girl shot and killed. THAT is what G.K. Butterfield supports. It's what he voted for.

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi in her support for violent rioters! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2Dwtpc1vpNxmng&b=Vm9GIa9mWP9AwFcqeT6o7Q)

Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen." No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure. ? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting. My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city. Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed. Dozens of violent shootings. An eight year old girl shot and killed. THAT is what G.K. Butterfield supports. It's what he voted for. I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi in her support for violent rioters! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I . I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

name: Team Joe
subject: re: VP pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We wanted to extend the opportunity for you to get on this list for another 24 hours. |
---
Peter,

As you've heard, Joe Biden plans to pick his running mate before next month's Democratic National Convention. It's an exciting time for all of us as we lock in the ticket that is going to win this election and make Donald Trump a one-term president.

In May, we emailed our supporters the special opportunity to add their name to be one of the first to learn about Joe's running mate pick when he's ready to share the news. And over 120,000 Team Joe supporters have already done so!

But, with so many new supporters joining the team since June, over 2.6 million to be exact, we wanted to extend the opportunity for you to get on this list for another 24 hours -- so don't miss this chance!

[Add your name right now to be one of the first to know who will be Joe Biden's vice presidential pick »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37d1/2343764131/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full") | **OFFER EXTENDED: BE THE FIRST TO KNOW ABOUT JOE 'S VP PICK!** **Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37d1/2343764131/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full") **Signed to be the first to know about Joe 's pick?** No, not yet!
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME HERE >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37d1/2343764131/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full")
---
Remember, Joe has pledged to select a female running mate, who would become the first woman to serve as Vice President in American history.

So you won't just be one of the first to know about one piece of this election, you'll be the first to learn about a major moment in our country's history.

**Peter, don 't pass up this opportunity again. Here's the link one more time to get on this exclusive list:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/first-to-know-vp](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37d1/2343764131/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.13_B1_vppickextend_X__F1_S2_C1__ns-full")

Thanks for being a special part of the team,

_Team Joe_

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37c8/2343764131/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37c7/2343764131/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37ca/2343764131/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf81/1cd0ac28/8b259fc5/357c37c5/2343764131/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

| Friends, Far too many substance-less political campaigns like to talk in generic platitudes about the issues. Not me! I want to give you in depth plans and statements about where I stand. I hope my "on the issues" emails give you more information about what I will do as your Congressman. You can visit my [issues section](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDY0NDI4MTkwNTM2NTcwODYyJmM9cTljOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjk5NzExNDkmZD1pOHAwaTB6.qB7dHGCtusB6x3F-2Mpv5RACF1nJQR9csCsLvqItGnA) for more, or call me directly on my personal cell phone at [603-969-7077](tel:603-969-7077) to discuss anything important to you! Thank you, - Matt
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **DEFENDING THE SECOND AMENDMENT** _“the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.”_ I fully support our 2nd Amendment right to keep and bear Arms 100% with no ambiguity. The war on our 2nd amendment rights from the left is real. Chris Pappas and his liberal friends in Congress want to take our guns away. Let me be clear – I won’t let them. I am the only candidate in this race that is 100% pro 2A. Now is not the time to nominate a Republican who doesn’t have a strong history of unequivocal support for the 2nd Amendment. I support:
1. National Constitutional carry.
2. Eliminate the need for a tax stamp to purchase a suppressor and amend current laws to treat a suppressor the same as any other firearm accessory.
3. National Stand Your Ground Legislation
4. National Concealed Carry Reciprosity

I am owner of New England Events, we put on the largest gun shows in New Hampshire and Maine. I don’t just support the second amendment, I celebrate it. I have worked to help NH gun shops, NH hunting stores, NH businesses that make firearm products and accessories, NH hunting clubs, NH shooting clubs, NH hunting and safety instructors find new audiences for their products and services. Over the last two years, I have hosted dozens of guns shows throughout our state and tens of thousands of New Hampshire citizens have attended one of my gun shows. There is nobody in this race that the extreme gun grabbing left fear more than me. I will not waiver, I will not give them an inch.
---

subject: Adam Kinzinger is silent on Trump's corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ef31e1d8f235/adam-kinzinger-is-silent-on-trumps-corruption?e=140a9b81e7)

| |

| |
#
It's incredibly easy to see through Donald Trump commuting Roger Stone's sentence for what it is: blatant, shameless corruption. Stone was convicted of lying to Congress and witness tampering in order to protect Trump, and Trump returned the favor by making sure that his friend didn't face any consequences.

As lawmakers from both parties have condemned Trump's latest exercise in corruption, my opponent **Adam Kinzinger has stayed silent.** Sadly, this isn't a surprise.**Kinzinger votes with Trump 94% of the time.** He's spent the last few months deflecting blame from Trump on issues like COVID-19 and the Russian bounties on U.S. soldiers. He even piled on Trump's recent attacks on Senator Tammy Duckworth.

[Click here to donate and help us beat Kinzinger this November. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ad905ee68f&e=140a9b81e7)

The people of Illinois' 16th district deserve a representative who will stand up to corruption whenever they see it, not a representative who is blindly loyal to their political party. **We have a chance to give this district the kind of representation they deserve and can be proud of. **

I can win this election and unseat a pro-Trump conservative, but I need your help to make it happen. [Can you donate today, and help make sure that we have the resources to win this race? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e573d4a6c4&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Don't let them steal this election from Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
(an urgent report from Georgia) |
---
Friend,

Last month we had our primary elections in Georgia.

Even in the face of incompetence and voter suppression on the part of Georgia's Secretary of State, Georgia Democrats SHATTERED turnout records. We nominated a man I am proud to endorse for the U.S. Senate: my friend Jon Ossoff.

_AND GET THIS: For the first time since 2008, Georgia's Democratic Primary voters** _exceeded_** Republican primary voters. We are building huge momentum here, friend!_
_**That's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 right now to support Jon Ossoff's Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**_

| | [Contribute to Jon Ossoff's campaign for U.S. Senate >> ](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2176/5b2c1286/3d838090/25f14673/2196578859/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_13_abrams_welcome_series?refcode=2020_07_13_Abrams_Welcome_Series&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

You all know my friend Jon Ossoff as the inspiring young Democrat who broke turnout and grassroots fundraising records in the historic Special Election for Georgia's Sixth District three years ago.

Jon came up just a few thousand votes short in the most expensive Congressional race of all time -- and amidst suspicious destruction of election data -- after running a historic campaign that built a huge progressive infrastructure in Georgia.

**You may not know that Jon is also a former Congressional national security aide who now works as a media executive and investigative journalist, and that Jon does amazing work exposing corruption, war crimes, and human rights abuses worldwide.**

Jon leads a business that investigates powerful corporations, human traffickers, and other bad actors for major news organizations.

And when he worked in Washington, Jon made a name for himself on Capitol Hill by helping investigate mass surveillance of American citizens and malfeasance by federal contractors.

**Friend, when it comes to fighting corruption, Jon Ossoff does not back down.**

When I ran for Governor in 2018, Georgia voters saw corruption and the abuse of power up close -- a voting system that failed by design and disenfranchised countless Georgia voters.

Last week, we saw the same voting system fail us again, so we must work harder than ever to mobilize and protect voters so that Jon can win.

**Friend, Jon Ossoff is currently leading his Republican opponent in the polls. But for Jon to win, we have to double down on our efforts to defend voting rights and ensure every vote is counted in Georgia.**

So I'm asking you now: to defend our values, to deliver TWO U.S. Senate victories in Georgia and win the White House, to send a message that will echo through history, please join me in chipping into Jon's campaign TODAY:

| [Chip in $5 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2176/5b2c1286/3d838090/25f14673/2196578859/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_13_abrams_welcome_series?refcode=2020_07_13_Abrams_Welcome_Series&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Stacey Abrams

If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2176/5b2c1286/3d838090/25f1467a/2196578859/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

| [Donate Now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2176/5b2c1286/3d838090/25f1467d/2196578859/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_X_footer_X__X_X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
Time's running out.
| Friend, If you want to join Jay and Beto for their conversation on Wednesday, this is your last chance to RSVP: **[Donate $15 -- or whatever makes sense to you! -- and you'll be all set to join Jay and Beto for an online conversation this Wednesday, July 15th, at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=3&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9634?t=4&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)

Jay and Beto are both committed to making this country better for all Americans, and that starts right here in Washington state with this year's election. That's why Beto's joining Jay to talk about what's happening in Washington and around the country -- and what we can all do to make this country more equitable for everyone.
**[You won't want to miss it -- donate now to RSVP!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=10&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)**
Thanks,
Team Inslee
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=11&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)

\------Forwarded message------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thu, Jul 9, 2020
Subject: Join me and Beto for a digital conversation on the path forward
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=12&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
_We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=13&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)** Thanks, and take care._
Friend,
Next week, I'll join Beto O'Rourke for a conversation about where America is going and what we can do together to strengthen it.
Beto has worked tirelessly to turn Texas blue, to build a grassroots movement to win the toughest fights up and down the ballot, and to end gerrymandering to strengthen our democracy. He's a champion for gun safety and for progressive immigration reform. Between all of that and our mutual love for basketball, there's so much to discuss -- I hope you'll join us.
**[Make a donation of $15, or whatever feels right to you, to join Beto O'Rourke and me for a conversation on Zoom next Wednesday, July 15th, at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=14&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9634?t=15&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9635?t=16&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9636?t=17&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9637?t=18&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9638?t=19&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=20&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)

My conversation with Paul Simon last night was so energizing, and that's one of the reasons I'm excited to spend some time with Beto, too -- we're all missing human connections and opportunities to catch up and talk about what matters, and I'm sure next week's conversation will be just as exciting.
Beto's been committed to speaking up for racial justice, environmental activism, and more -- and having both been on the national stage this year speaking out about Donald Trump, I'm sure we'll have stories to share.
**[You won't want to miss this conversation: Just donate $15, or whatever you're comfortable with, and you'll be eligible to join us on July 15th.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9633?t=21&akid=8096%2E868730%2EUUewp4)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

Thanks, Team Inslee \------Forwarded message------ From: Jay Inslee Date: Thu, Jul 9, 2020 Subject: Join me and Beto for a digital conversation on the path forward We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. Friend, Next week, I'll join Beto O'Rourke for a conversation about where America is going and what we can do together to strengthen it. Beto has worked tirelessly to turn Texas blue, to build a grassroots movement to win the toughest fights up and down the ballot, and to end gerrymandering to strengthen our democracy. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director
subject: the future of the Post Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Postal Service isn't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age.
|
---

| | Derek --

You've likely been hearing a lot about how the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) is in trouble. This isn't a scare tactic; I want to quickly make the case for Congressional action to protect USPS before I ask you to sign a petition.

I know there's a little bit of a disconnect here -- I'm the digital director for Mark Warner's re-election campaign, and I'm asking you to support snail mail. I might spend most of my time online, but I still rely on the Postal Service.

**The Postal Service isn 't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age.** It processes 182 million pieces of first-class mail **every day**. A lot of those pieces of mail are medication, bills, bill payments, and other critically important documents.

We depend on the Postal Service, even if we don't think about it every day. During this time of unprecedented physical distancing, the postal system is providing a vital service to thousands of Americans who want to stay in touch with loved ones. And come November, many more Americans may want to use this system to safely cast their ballots by mail.

Saving the Postal Service does more than keep us connected -- it keeps people employed. The U.S. Postal Service employs 600,000 folks across the country, and now their employment hangs in the balance. These hardworking people could lose their jobs unless Congress acts quickly to help the Postal Service.

**[Now that you've heard the case, will you consider signing our petition to protect USPS?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc8/53d9897e/54409517/1c884e1e/430483294/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-postpet")**

Thank you for hearing me out, and for your continued support.

-- Marcy, Digital Director | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc8/53d9897e/54409517/1c884e1d/430483294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200713_p_1_fl__647__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")******
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc8/53d9897e/54409517/1c884e1c/430483294/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: First Lady Makes Surprise Visit and Delivers Box Lunches to Women and Children’s Shelter
body:
Melania Trump made a surprise visit and delivered box lunches on Thursday to a women and children’s shelter in Washington, D.C. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b58bc8cfe5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **First Lady Makes Surprise Visit and Delivers Box Lunches to Women and Children’s Shelter**

“Melania Trump made a surprise visit and delivered box lunches on Thursday to a women and children’s shelter in Washington, D.C.,” Katie Jerkovich reports for _The Daily Caller_.

“It is important that, even in these challenging times, we find ways to help and connect with people and acknowledge the important work that is being done in countless communities across the United States,” the First Lady said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03269123ba&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Nearly half of [New York City’s] 205 shootings played out across 10 historically crime-ridden precincts during the bloodiest June on record since 1996 . . . The surge in violence also correlates with the disbanding of the NYPD’s anti-crime unit of plainclothes officers who focused on taking guns off the street,” Sara Dorn reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8b1b7a86f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Schools should open in the fall. It’s critical for meeting the educational and social needs of children. But local officials should have the discretion to take tailored actions to help keep children safe . . . I’ve talked to Republican and Democratic governors about their strategies. The commitment to reopening is universal,” former FDA Commissioner Scott Gottlieb writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f949c22b53&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Seattle police Chief Carmen Best on Friday accused the City Council of recklessness and ‘political pandering’ by advocating to slash her department’s budget by 50 percent, arguing that cutting funds to that extent would be asking citizens ‘to test out a theory that crime goes away if police go away,’” Danielle Wallace reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d01ff4768b&e=3ee4985eea).

**WATCH LIVE at 2 p.m. ET** : [President Trump holds roundtable with families saved and protected by American law enforcement officers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c672fd76a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=143ed86e49&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e77e5e8d98&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a12e4e58cc)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Breaking: Susan B. Anthony List Endorses Miller-Meeks
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

Today, we are proud to accept the endorsement of the Susan B. Anthony List!

The Susan B. Anthony List is a family of organizations committed to healing, not hurting, and shielding, not shaming. Those organizations and the more than 837,000 pro-life Americans they represent stand tall in the public arena in support of the unborn and I am honored to have their support and accept the endorsement of the Susan B. Anthony List. I will not waver in my determination to protect the unborn and advance the principle that all life is precious.

_"With a 100 percent pro-life voting record during her time in the Iowa Senate, Mariannette Miller-Meeks can be depend ended on to stand with unborn children and their mothers"_ \- **Marilyn Musgrave, SBA List Candidate Fund Vice President.**

If you share these same values, please join our Pro-Life coalition by clicking [here](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=092b2619f5&e=16fac31a0f), or contribute to our campaign at [https://millermeeks.com/donate/](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=205c39d502&e=16fac31a0f)

I'm grateful for your support,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

body:
|

| |
---
| | **California has 53 US House Representatives.** _Less than 15% of them are Republicans. _ This year, as our next Representative, _Matt Rosendale will need all the help he can get!_ Conservatives are fleeing liberal, high-tax states and are packing up and heading to Republican led states where taxes are lower and red tape and regulations don’t suffocate innovation and industry. Recently it was reported that turnout for the 2020 census has been lower than expected. **Montana cannot sit by and potential lose a valuable seat as well as valuable federal funding based on population.**_

Montana needs more representation in DC and we need less radical dems like Nancy Pelosi, Kamala Harris, Maxine Waters, Diane Feinstein, and Schifty Adam Schiff. _ Click on the link below. Fill out the census and tell the left that Montana is fed up being dictated to by politicians who cannot even control their own streets.

body:
We only have three weeks before Michelle's primary election and we need your help with our digital Get Out the Vote program.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

We only have **three weeks** before Michelle's primary election and we need your help with our digital Get Out the Vote program.

Over the next few weeks, we're going to be reaching out directly to Kansans over the phone and online to make sure they know Michelle is the different kind of leader we need in Congress. But it's going to take a lot of resources to reach as many voters as possible.

That's where you come in.

subject: What you can do RIGHT NOW to expand voting.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=355278b4e7&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Tell Governor Holcomb to Allow
No Excuse Absentee Vote-By-Mail!**
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b65b408afe&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

A couple weeks ago, we asked you to send an email to Governor Holcomb petitioning for no excuse absentee vote-by-mail in order to include every Hoosier for November’s general election due to the ongoing pandemic.

Thank you to everyone who took action! Since then, we developed a tool on our website to make this even easier. If you didn’t get a chance to sign the first email, there’s still time.
---
| [STAND UP FOR VOTING RIGHTS →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7cf51c690f&e=5886ca081d "STAND UP FOR VOTING RIGHTS →")
---
| Now, please, we have two simple asks of you:

First, will you share the link on social media and ask your networks to do the same? We want Governor Holcomb to know that protecting the safety of voters and poll workers alike is a non-negotiable. [**https://pathackettforcongress.com/landing/vbm/**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3dfdcf0130&e=5886ca081d) Second, we just started a digital advertising campaign to voters of the district asking them to email Governor Holcomb as well. Will you chip in $10 to keep this outreach going?
---
| [PITCH IN $10 TO EXPAND VOTING ACCESS →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=31faee9839&e=5886ca081d "PITCH IN $10 TO EXPAND VOTING ACCESS →")
---
| [PITCH IN SOMETHING ELSE →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=883e74472f&e=5886ca081d "PITCH IN SOMETHING ELSE →")
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically. _

Thank you for your help in promoting a safe election in November!

\-- Team Hackett
---
|
---
|
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=725733267d&e=5886ca081d)
---

---
I joined the U.S. Army after 9/11 to do more in a time of crisis. That's the same reason I got into this race -- our country is in a crisis and it's my duty to step up and serve.
This time, we're facing a _crisis of leadership._
**Washington politicians are putting corporate special interests over the interests of Tennesseans, and my opponent Bill Hagerty promises to be another rubber stamp like Sen. Marsha Blackburn.**
That's why Trump tweet-launched Hagerty's campaign months before he even got started. It's why **Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, Sen. Tom Cotton** , Alternative facts **Kellyanne Conway** and more have helped Hagerty stuff _**more than $5 million**_ into his campaign coffers.
[_**Our campaign is about Tennessee -- not special interests. It runs on small-dollar contributions from grassroots supporters like you, and I 'm counting on your support ahead of the FEC deadline this Friday. If you are able to chip in a few dollars, please contribute today. Any amount at all makes a big difference.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c8/18d6a294/4c84ee8e/26d7f5b3/2013659449/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200713?refcode=jme200713_b_other&refcode2=107423")
In service,
James

name: Vote-by-Mail Alert
subject: Obama and Abrams need YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The soul of our democracy is at stake.
| | |
---
Friend, the soul of our democracy is at stake - and we need to make sure every single voice is heard at the ballot box this November.
But Republicans are launching an all-out assault on voting rights across the country, attacking vote-by-mail and forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights. **That's why Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are calling on YOU to help defend our right to vote before it's too late: **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk376-su-nd")
This isn't just hypothetical, friend: With all the dirty voter-suppression tricks played in 2018, Stacey Abrams fell just _55,000_ votes short of winning her governor's race. We can't let history repeat itself - Democrats across the country have to speak out NOW.
**We need to hear from just 32 more Democrats in Georgia by midnight, but we're still missing your response. With the most important election of our lifetimes before us, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**
---
| | | [YES](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk376-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk376-su-nd")
---

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5fc/288179be/8631c4b/348e6b07/3317629996/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. name: Tina Smith
subject: Direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I’ll be direct: **Democrats have virtually no chance to take back the Senate OR the White House if we lose in Minnesota — which puts a lot of pressure on our campaign to succeed.** But I’m confident we can win this race and stop the GOP from flipping Minnesota red. The only problem is that my team is telling me we are not on track to reach our critical fundraising goal before the mid-month deadline on Thursday. So, I told them I’d reach out to our core group of supporters (hint: you!). **I’m personally asking you to contribute toward our mid-July goal before we’re permanently behind for the month. body:
I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Peter --
I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: [**can you chip in $5 to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump?**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

In just three years of Donald Trump's presidency, it feels like our government and America's place in the world has been hollowed out -- like a pumpkin on Halloween. The only difference is that there's no light in there.

Instead, the White House is occupied by a puffed-up, self-absorbed, all-hat-and-no-cattle cowboy.

I don't say this lightly, but it's become more and more clear that Donald Trump is an inept and corrupt narcissist. And rather than facing the challenge of leading America through a national crisis, he's refused to take responsibility and started lashing out at others.

We can't afford four more years of a man who cares more about his own power and celebrity than he does about the health and success of our country.

Joe Biden understands the concept of public service. It has been his life's commitment. Joe Biden hits the ground running. He comes to the White House with a full understanding of what the job of Chief Executive entails.

**Joe Biden is the kind of leader we need right now, Peter. That's why I'm not sitting out this election, and why I'm asking you to stay in this fight with me.**

[**If you can, will you make your first contribution today to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump? I know whatever you're able to give will make a real difference.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, with Joe Biden in the White House, we'll finally be able to get back to the issues that really matter.

We can protect access to healthcare. We can recommit to combating climate change. We can reverse Trump's corruption of our government and start rebuilding our economy.

But we can't do any of that unless we beat Donald Trump in November.

[We can't afford to fall short right now, Peter. If you're with Joe and me in this fight to kick Donald Trump out of the White House, I hope you'll use this link to donate today:](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Donate**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B2_jamestaylor_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

All my best,

James Taylor

_James Taylor is a multiple Grammy award-winning singer and songwriter. He has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Songwriters Hall of Fame and is the recipient of the National Medal of Arts and the Presidential Medal of Freedom. James Taylor supports Joe Biden for President._
