clean_body: I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: | | "" Peter -- I'm reaching out personally to ask because this election is the most important one in my lifetime: "" In just three years of Donald Trump's presidency, it feels like our government and America's place in the world has been hollowed out -- like a pumpkin on Halloween. The only difference is that there's no light in there. Instead, the White House is occupied by a puffed-up, self-absorbed, all-hat-and-no-cattle cowboy. I don't say this lightly, but it's become more and more clear that Donald Trump is an inept and corrupt narcissist. And rather than facing the challenge of leading America through a national crisis, he's refused to take responsibility and started lashing out at others. We can't afford four more years of a man who cares more about his own power and celebrity than he does about the health and success of our country. Joe Biden understands the concept of public service. It has been his life's commitment. Joe Biden hits the ground running. He comes to the White House with a full understanding of what the job of Chief Executive entails. Joe Biden is the kind of leader we need right now, Peter. That's why I'm not sitting out this election, and why I'm asking you to stay in this fight with me. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Peter, with Joe Biden in the White House, we'll finally be able to get back to the issues that really matter. We can protect access to healthcare. We can recommit to combating climate change. We can reverse Trump's corruption of our government and start rebuilding our economy. But we can't do any of that unless we beat Donald Trump in November. "" "" All my best, James Taylor James Taylor is a multiple Grammy award-winning singer and songwriter. He has been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Songwriters Hall of Fame and is the recipient of the National Medal of Arts and the Presidential Medal of Freedom. body:
Let's FIRE Nancy Pelosi | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ryanchamberlin.com/new-commercial-airing-today-fire?e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [ ](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=6139cdc2d7&e=d703fa4981)
---
| |
# **Did you see my NEW COMMERCIAL?**

[Click here to watch now...](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=a2eb92050b&e=d703fa4981) and then SHARE it on FB

Since February 4th, when I launched my campaign, we've been gaining momentum. Now, I am recognized as a top contender despite being a political outsider. Our message, grass roots support, and commitment to solidifying the future of the United States of America is a winning combo for district 3 and beyond.

This commercial launches the last 5 weeks of the primary (August 18h). If you haven't already (or even if you have), now is the time to kick in and help us spread the word, secure the votes, and win the nomination! Click here https://bit.ly/helpRyanwin

Here is the Full PRESS RELEASE from today...
**CHAMBERLIN CAMPAIGN UNVEILS FIRST TV AD**
**OCALA** – Today, the Ryan Chamberlin for Congress Campaign unveiled their first tv ad called “Fire.” It is hard-hitting on the issues and calls for the American people to fire Nancy Pelosi and the America-hating socialists that are in currently in charge of Congress.

“President Trump is in the fight of his life for re-election, and we need conservatives across Florida and America to get out to vote,” said candidate Ryan Chamberlin. “But his re-election means nothing if we do not have conservatives in charge of Congress. We must once again control all three branches of government if we are to pass important reforms and put America on a path to permanent prosperity.”

Building on the success of Ryan’s straight-talking style used in his radio ads, the advertisement features Ryan speaking directly to camera and includes Ryan’s wife Jenny in a small portion. The ad (link) begins with Ryan watching CNN’s Chris Cuomo on tv and then the script is as follows:

_Aren’t you tired of the arrogant self-righteousness?_
_The media calls us idiots for supporting President Trump._
_Racists for saying all lives matter._
_Bigots for securing the border._
_And they think every one of us is carrying a gun._
_Can’t imagine why._
_I’m Ryan Chamberlin, and I approve this message._
_Because I’m tired of Congress being run by America-hating socialists._
_Let’s fire Nancy Pelosi._
_And keep America great._
_One nation under God._

Noted conservative State Representative Stan McClain who recently endorsed Chamberlin said that the ad was powerful in that is spoke for frustrated conservatives who endure unprecedented name-calling by a new brand of radical socialists who are leading the Democratic Party.

Chamberlin is fast emerging as one of the top tier candidates in the CD3 race and is beginning to unify conservative voices across the district.

For the past 20 years, Ryan and his wife Jenny have worked with thousands of entrepreneurs, assisting them in growing their influence and profitability through focused strategies of leadership, improved productivity and by revolutionizing their marketing strategies and corporate cultures. Ryan has worked with Success Magazine, speaks regularly at national conferences, and was recently featured at the Marion County TEDX Ocala as a guest speaker. In 2010, Ryan authored his first book titled Now You Know, a book to help entrepreneurs build better teams through common sense principles that focus on growth.

__

Click here to help us win the nomination - https://bit.ly/helpRyanwin
---
| | | | | | | [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=6d2889039c&e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=29e9f6d666&e=d703fa4981)
---
|
---

Ryan Chamberlin for Congress12305 SE 55th Avenue RdBelleview, FL 34420-5121
[Add us to your address book](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7&e=d703fa4981) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7&e=d703fa4981&c=3fc44b3a84).

clean_body: | Hey, Kendall here. As Team Espy’s Research Director, I’ve been spending a lot of time looking into our far-right opponent Cindy Hyde-Smith’s history, and let me tell you, she knows how to make headlines for all the wrong reasons. Hyde-Smith isn’t known for her record in the Senate or any achievements she’s made for the people of Mississippi. She’s known for these headlines: “Mississippi GOP Sen. Hyde-Smith Calls Voter Suppression ‘Great Idea.’” – NBC News , 11/15/18 “Cindy Hyde-Smith Jokes About Sitting On ‘Front Row’ Of Public Hanging” – Clarion Ledger , 11/11/18 “Photo Surfaces Of Cindy Hyde-Smith Posing With Confederate Artifacts” – CNN , 11/20/18 = Yep, those are photos that Hyde-Smith posted on Facebook herself. Our opponent thinks the confederacy was Mississippi “at its best!” Enough said. The choice is clear: Hyde-Smith wants to keep this state stuck in the past, while Mike Espy wants to move it forward. Help us continue to spread the word about our far-right opponent and get out the vote for Mike before November’s general election. Make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can before our mid-month deadline this Thursday: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Kendall W. I’ve always believed that our freedoms are just as fragile as they are great – and they’re never more than a generation away from extinction. AOC claimed that a $1 billion cut to the NYPD **“wasn’t enough”.**
Meanwhile, Ilhan Omar declared that she intends to tear down our country by **“dismantling”** our economic and political systems.
**This is the liberal 2020 agenda in a nutshell. Tear down our police. Tear down our economy. Tear down our history. And tear down the government our Founding Fathers designed.** [**DISMANTLE THE LIBERAL 2020 AGENDA**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=05aae78eb9164ec9944324de11a7ba11&_e=ogecW3GFRgEoxaWJ6Asj7SQ-8WFNDHoM-eWTkFfeMeViACxMJO0KI-oMwDPWjK_U498FrJA1ZebyZyEa5vHJefZa3EXbXVbds3ZgDFapa1cxVp3MO-rKtwoZtjnw4XueNBLjEO32kyPCxufVW2LGd-qVsJj0tlrkE9lkfmu9sSY89kSL3250nk6S7xfIJHicvgXkQd-349ovHzAm8LHAioAmMuwkiGI6WO7W3ZOQVDGKi-qQyn1XC5IEOG_wtqdd9TOxsLaZqltryxg-raDsUA7xecg6jTRRoK7l2VhY08U8sXR1rjC0t2hDcdFNRLHbSn56zPYz8jIqR6-UdiM3wn1nYPIwxiUgK134UqUlwK77_tgMYSQ8Qp6KV5t5J-AWEKlEO9gcndf42oLhD69zErbQRb5gxBjqOVwsaaD-Lsv4zV0btjAaPS1k-TaFmH0NU9OcgAfYCvGDp8zeD3vaWneGlWGpvKySOX-1aeXptkc%3D) It’s hard to believe that we’ve come to this point, and with less than FOUR MONTHS left until Election Day and our mid-month fundraising deadline coming up this Saturday, time is ticking for us to save America as we know it – because that’s really what’s on the line!
I’ve always believed that our freedoms are just as fragile as they are great – and they’re never more than a generation away from extinction.
**I’m going to Washington to make sure our freedoms live to see another generation, but I need your help to get there first. **

body:
Once again, Donald Trump has lowered the bar for presidential standards by granting clemency to his close friend and political ally Roger Stone -- _despite_ a jury convicting Stone of lying to Congress, witness tampering, and obstructing a congressional committee proceeding.
**Let 's get one thing straight: this country has two separate justice systems: one for the powerful and one for the poor. **
Because of Stone's proximity to the President, he will not serve _a single day_ of his 40-month sentence. Meanwhile, Black and Brown folks are sent to prison for petty, non-violent crimes every single day.
_**This**_ is why people across our country continue to protest in the streets.
_**This**_ is why people are demanding major reforms to our criminal justice system.
So, the next time President Trump refers to BLM activists as "thugs," remember that it's Trump and his right-wing cronies who have jeopardized our democracy and made a mockery of our judicial system for personal gain.
**A s long I'm serving the people of CA-38, I promise to stand up to President Trump's selfish actions, hypocritical agenda, and ignorant policies. To do that, however, I need to win re-election in November. [Will you help ramp up my campaign efforts so I can continue to hold the President accountable?](https://act.myngp.com/el/oitszGOCRV1T9eU6JFbKFK9oQsxugz96Mjnns__rWQM=/U5W4LH0b8GQC9YZlsM5e7GbOkxfdNvNpLc_feENtrKQ=?refcode=X_071320_RogerStone)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A fighter for Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66069/3645882295/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66068/3645882295/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

When I think of the type of person I want by my side in the Senate, taking on the special interests and speaking truth to power, this is what comes to my mind: _a fighter_.

**MJ Hegar is the fighter we need to flip Texas and put power in the hands of the people, and I am so proud to support her.** On Tuesday, Texans will head to the polls to choose their nominee to defeat Sen. John Cornyn. We need to make sure MJ wins on Tuesday so she can win in November.

**[I told MJ I'd do everything I can to help her, and right now that means asking you this: If you're in a place to donate, will you support MJ by making a donation of $3 right now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef6606f/3645882295/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=3")**

MJ hasn't spent her whole career in politics trying to please big donors to fund campaign after campaign. She bravely served her country as a combat search and rescue pilot in Afghanistan, earning a Purple Heart and Distinguished Flying Cross with Valor, and then took on the Washington establishment -- opening military jobs to millions of women.

MJ knows that the rules of Washington are rigged to benefit the wealthy and well-connected. She knows that when a politician isn't voting in the interests of their constituents, just follow the money, and you'll see who they're really working for. So, why has Senator Cornyn refused to support policies that the majority of Texans and Americans believe in, like common-sense gun safety measures? Because he's been taking millions of dollars from special interests like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the private detention industry.

It is NOT enough to win the White House in 2020. We need a new Senate majority leader, because with Mitch McConnell, we have no shot of taking action on climate change, expanding health care coverage, or reforming our immigration system. With Mitch in charge, change goes nowhere. Bills that would help millions of Americans simply die in Mitch's legislative graveyard.

**We need to flip the Senate, and MJ is the key to flipping Texas. So if you're able to, I 'm asking you to pitch in whatever you can and fight by MJ's side:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef6606e/3645882295/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef6606d/3645882295/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef6606c/3645882295/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66063/3645882295/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66062/3645882295/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__")**
MJ is fighting hard, so let's get out there and fight hard with her.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66068/3645882295/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgjuly?refcode=email_20200713.2nd__1735__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66061/3645882295/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1735&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489013c/7f51f7bc/41d1d3b9/4ef66060/3645882295/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

MJ for Texas

subject: Nancy set her sights on Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We can't let her win! | |
---
| | | Patriot,

**Nancy Pelosi is targeting the 2nd district. **While Steve Watkins has been dealing with his scandals, our Democrat opponent in the Kansas 2nd congressional district race, Topeka Mayor Michelle De La Isla has had a busy Summer. She has been **endorsed by Elizabeth Warren** , and _held fundraisers with**Amy Klobuchar, Pete Buttigieg, and Kathleen Sebelius.**_

Michelle De La Isla will be _**getting added help from the National Democrats**_ because they know **they can beat Steve Watkins**. That is why this primary is so important.
---
| Jake is our only chance of keeping Pelosi's influence out of the 2nd district.**
[Would you consider donating to help Jake win the primary?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=05bdad4b11&e=1050d051da)**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0acf07d8e7&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| But we've known this for a while. [It was reported in January](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d4d07c8a2c&e=1050d051da) that the DCCC had **targeted the 2nd district** because of _**Watkins' weakness**_ as a candidate.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8f425898be&e=1050d051da)
---
| This is why Jake LaTurner's candidacy is necessary. Jake LaTurner is a proven conservative with the integrity and strength to bring our Kansas values to Washington, D.C., and represent us well. **_Jake is also the only candidate we can trust to keep this seat from Nancy Pelosi._** Jake LaTurner will not be distracted by constant scandals or felony investigations and can focus entirely on delivering results for Kansans.
---
| [Donate $25]( "Donate $25")

| [Donate $100](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bac6b59ddb&e=1050d051da "Donate $100")

---
|
---
| **We cannot afford to lose any more ground in Kansas.** Join us in showing the Democrats they are up against the strongest opponent Kansas 2nd congressional district has to offer, and they will NOT be taking this seat for Nancy Pelosi!

We sincerely appreciate your support!

Yours in the fight,

Kansans for LaTurner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07c8c44bfd54/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, wonderful Dani Family! The countdown is on! We are T-114 days away from election day, and we’re so grateful we’ve got you all to make each one count. Make sure you’re getting ready for the**Zoom chat with Dani tomorrow, Tuesday, July 14th at 6 pm!** Save the date and be there! We’ll send out the zoom link tomorrow. But first: let’s reflect on the progress we’ve made together this week.
* **We’re almost halfway to reaching our goal** of filling Soldier Field with voters we called by the end of the summer!
* You all connected with **4,848 people** on the phone this week, which is incredible.

Let’s keep it up!
* **MVP of the week** award goes to Madison N. who made more than**300** of those calls!

**Some things to look forward to/stay tuned for...: **
* This week we’re starting**lit drops** throughout the district. A “lit drop” is when we take our literature (fliers, etc.) to a door and drop it off at the house. It’s safer than door-to-door canvassing because we won’t be trying to speak with any voters at the door. We’ll provide masks and gloves for anyone interested and are looking to start this in all the corners of the district by next weekend. Who’s interested? Email [Kathy@daniforillinois.com](mailto:Kathy@daniforillinois.com) and let her know where you’d be willing to go and what days you’re interested. We’ll be doing Sat 10-1 and 1-4 and Sunday 1-4 shifts. Additional times available!!
* Will County Dems are hosting a **CandiDATE with Dani Brzozowski** event on Thurs, at 7 pm! The event is free and will be on Zoom (register using this link: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcpdeiurTkoH9fcoCeph6TPe18sz4VmrBOh](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f77fd7b1d0&e=140a9b81e7)) or on Facebook Live. They’ll be taking q’s so bring along some good ones!

[https://www.facebook.com/events/1499565020246295/](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=756f51f3ca&e=140a9b81e7)
* **An Indivisible Unity event** with five Indivisible-endorsed candidates is happening next week on Wed, July 22nd at 6 pm! We’re very proud to be in such good company. Come join us on Zoom!

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indivisbleunity](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=697e978c9a&e=140a9b81e7)
* Mark your calendars for our first outdoor event in months! We’re pairing up with Elizabeth Lindquist, a Winnebago County Board candidate, to jointly host **Grab a shake with Dani and Elizabeth,** on July 25th at 2 pm. We’ll be social distancing in the future park behind Dari Ripple in South Beloit.

[https://www.facebook.com/events/282792776263912/](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=dd9a96bb70&e=140a9b81e7) A few reminders/Don’t Forget...:
* **ITS SUMMER & ITS TIME TO PARTY!**: If you are interested in hosting a **Virtual House Party** for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, and all you need to do is sit back with your happy hour drink of choice and invite your friends to do the same!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking,**CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!
* Want to be featured as a Volunteer Voice columnist? If you have helpful tips on effective outreach, send them my way!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Claudia L. _Recently, I’ve been doing my calls on a picnic blanket at a park near my house. If you’re able to set up a hot spot or access votebuilder from an outdoor space, I’d definitely recommend it. Being outside puts me in a much more tranquil mood and makes sure I don’t end up cooped inside all day. _
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director

Jon's surge has the GOP panicking. |

Friend, did you see that on Friday ANOTHER nonpartisan analyst upgraded Democratic prospects in Georgia?

To recap:
> **Wednesday:** The Cook Political Report promoted Georgia to **"toss-up."**
>
> **Thursday:** Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball increased Jon's odds of defeating Sen. David Perdue, calling Georgia a **"genuinely competitive state."**
>
> **Friday:** Nathan Gonzales' Inside Elections moved the race TWO steps toward Jon, warning **Perdue's seat is in "jeopardy"** for the GOP.
**THREE days, THREE prominent nonpartisan observers noted the _growing likelihood that Democrats will win Georgia in November!_**

_It's no wonder Donald Trump is flying to Georgia this week, and Mitch McConnell-linked super PACs are pouring over $21 million into stopping Jon Ossoff._

**Friend, our surging momentum has David Perdue and the entire GOP in panic mode about losing Georgia.**

body:
Friends, The _Wall Street Journal_ just highlighted Tiffany’s run for Congress. Tiffany is the face of a new wave of Republican women who are running to protect our 2nd amendment and support President Trump’s America first agenda in Congress. See the article here: **[https://www.wsj.com/articles/gop-women-embrace-guns-in-house-races](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=c711d2fe8b534487b087940c5352b6d4&_e=SPsI-F7yz4OXRSyNXTR3_3W3Av8KMTG2Dlt804dddPqsQIuKJqDhybZfJMrI1z56nkM-acIjEuOfgXgCdW2ispQH6UyLQG-5_7DbEMn2BQBdFvUVHlToCQIBmFRp1os_4zv_YnWQJDaVedsUqFY5XkwMYFxWvN5Y7IEsV3lVZB0DA2Pis38SOKYovOuUer0Q5sRh3CgCqc-QhmrkPhtvpQ01NVaqg48YkQJ7Eke1JFVyuFJJokzhr0m9KqxUqLbPqUbKqJtxqeUoPcknxEjuuFbe52MGd065s5Ugz4pO71OSIxyvVOW0WDA0jzB9RRjWJDZm-uztzlHRkvsUT3d4Mg%3D%3D)** The _WSJ_ even included mention of Tiffany’s video discussing having to confront, while 6 months pregnant, smugglers whose car broke down on her farm that was filled with drugs. The only thing that stood between them and her children inside was her and a firearm. That incident reinforced what Tiffany already knew. clean_body: Friends, The Wall Street Journal just highlighted Tiffany’s run for Congress. Tiffany is the face of a new wave of Republican women who are running to protect our 2nd amendment and support President Trump’s America first agenda in Congress. See the article here: The WSJ even included mention of Tiffany’s video discussing having to confront, while 6 months pregnant, smugglers whose car broke down on her farm that was filled with drugs. The only thing that stood between them and her children inside was her and a firearm. That incident reinforced what Tiffany already knew. We must protect our constitutional right to bear arms and we must secure our border. Tiffany Shedd will defend our Second Amendment and protect our families. Can you donate today to support Tiffany and the Second Amendment? Tiffany has proven that she is willing to do tough things to solve problems and will stand her ground to protect our families and Second Amendment rights. She needs your support! Thank you, Chris Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: ChristyforCongress.org
subject: Garcia (LITERALLY) stands with Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Mike Garcia's top priority in Congress is rubber-stamping Donald Trump's far-right agenda, not delivering for our district.

Just last week, Mike went to the White House and stood beside Trump (literally) to thank the president for his leadership. **Doesn't Mike realize that Trump's incompetent leadership during the pandemic has literally cost over 130,000 people their lives?** He has his head in the sand while our hospitals fill up with COVID-19 patients.

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bad1/29776869/9e9baf4/569ee69a/2754119064/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTNfZ2FyY2lhcnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200713_garciarr-full")
It's time to elect a leader in CA-25 who cares about more than party politics and who won't stop fighting for what's right for our community -- not just powerful Washington politicians.

Even as Donald Trump downplays the risk of COVID-19 and refuses to take action to curb the pandemic, Mike Garcia stays in lockstep with the president. And he has the voting record to prove it...

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight gives Mike a Trump score of _**100%.**_

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bad1/29776869/9e9baf4/569ee69a/2754119064/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTNfZ2FyY2lhcnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200713_garciarr-full")
Here's the thing about Mike Garcia: He was elected to serve the folks of California's 25th district, but it's clear that he only cares about serving the national Republican officials who will help him hold onto power.

Maybe he's afraid that standing up for his constituents would mean he has to stand up _to_ Donald Trump.

Our district deserves a representative who isn't afraid to stand up to _anyone_ \-- and that's Christy.

**[We need Christy fighting for us in Congress, and she'll only get there with our help. Please, pitch in $5 or more to tell Garcia that we're done with representatives who aren't in it for us.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bad1/29776869/9e9baf4/569ee69a/2754119064/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTNfZ2FyY2lhcnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200713_garciarr-full")**

\-- ChristyforCongress.org

Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bad1/29776869/9e9baf4/569ee69a/2754119064/VEsHBg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTNfZ2FyY2lhcnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200713_garciarr-full")

subject: PPP: "This is likely to be a highly competitive race"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
New polling shows we can flip Texas AND the Senate!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890138/7f51f7bc/41d51c2c/4ef663bf/1891437820/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
**We need just four seats to flip the Senate, Peter,** and new polling from Public Policy Polling and EMILY's List shows _Texas_ could seal the deal!

Sen. Cornyn has an abysmal 29% approval rating, and a huge number of Texans are still undecided in the general election -- **Public Policy Polling says that according to the data, "this is likely to be a highly competitive race." [(And with your help, MJ can win! >>>)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890138/7f51f7bc/41d51c2c/4ef663be/1891437820/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200713.3nd__1707__&amount=10")**

In order to have the best chance of defeating Sen. Cornyn, MJ has to win tomorrow's runoff first. We're working around the clock to get voters to the polls and make the case for why MJ is the best choice to take on Sen. Cornyn and fight for Texans in the Senate, but we need your help.

**We 've set a goal of bringing on 23 new grassroots donors from your community, and we're hoping you can help us meet it. Will you pitch in now to help us defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate this November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: a few things you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I can't win this fight alone.
| | |
---
Friend,

We're in a fight for the soul of our nation's democracy, and I need your help to win it.
I'm a pastor and community leader, and I'm running a people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government. **We have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to win this race and take back the Senate:**
* Unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) mired in controversy over her shameful attacks against the Black Lives Matter movement - and now, polling shows Democrats CAN flip this seat.
* But Loeffler is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and POLITICO says Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the Republican establishment to support her and protect his GOP majority.
* We need to raise another $13,312 from grassroots supporters by midnight to fight back, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats - but time is running out, and we're still falling short.

Now more than ever, we need real leadership in Washington, but Kelly has shown she's not up to the task - she'd rather give in to the narrow impulses of tribalism and bigotry. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat her - but I can't win this fight alone.
**Friend, we 're on track to miss our critical fundraising goal unless grassroots folks like you give now to get us back on track. With Senate control at stake, I have to ask: [_Will you give $5 - as much as you can afford before midnight tonight - to make sure we have what it takes to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate and restore moral leadership to Washington?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5f3/288179be/85cec8e/348e6b89/1950634161/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzc3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk377-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: asking for $5 to protect our rights and liberties in the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Supreme Court hangs in the balance of this November's presidential election. |
---
_If you believe that the consequences of this November 's election will last for generations, [then please dig deep and pitch in your first $5 to elect Joe Biden.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B3_scotus_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,275&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.13_B3_scotus_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1")_
* * *
Peter --

As you're probably well aware, recent Supreme Court decisions to protect LGBTQ+ workers from discrimination, preserve the DACA program, and strike down a dangerous anti-choice law in Louisiana were all decided by tight 6-3 and 5-4 votes. And last Wednesday they put out a ruling that makes it easier for the Trump-Pence Administration to continue to strip health care from women.

These were historic decisions, so we're not kidding around when we say that the future majority and shape of the Supreme Court hang in the balance of whoever wins this November's presidential election.

And recently, Donald Trump has run campaign ads calling these decisions by the Supreme Court "politically charged" and going so far as to say, "We are starting to get the impression the Supreme Court doesn't like Trump."

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The stories the media doesn’t tell
body:
Last June, Kemira Boyd’s 12-day-old baby suddenly began to choke. In distress, Boyd jumped into her car, speeding to get help as quickly as possible. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42c9995994&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **The stories the media doesn’t tell**

**Last June,** Kemira Boyd’s 12-day-old baby suddenly began to choke. In distress, Boyd jumped into her car, speeding to get help as quickly as possible.

**Deputy William Kimbro,** a South Carolina police officer, pulled over Boyd for a routine traffic stop when he saw her vehicle. After finding the frantic mother and child inside, he immediately went to work, clearing the baby’s windpipe and helping her to begin breathing again until an emergency medical team arrived. Kimbro saved the child’s life.

**Today, Boyd’s child** is now Deputy Kimbro’s goddaughter.

🎬 [**How Deputy Kimbro saved the life of Kemira Boyd’s 12-day-old baby**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=927465311c&e=3ee4985eea)

**America’s police officers** aren’t the enemy**.** The vast majority of our country’s law enforcement heroes honor their uniforms each day by saving countless lives and keeping our neighborhoods free from drugs, theft, and violence.

**Yet in recent weeks,** the men and women in blue have faced attacks from rioters and hostility from leftwing pundits and politicians. Radical Democrats in both Congress and city halls across our country have echoed calls to defund or even abolish police forces.

**“Our officers** have been under vicious assault, and hundreds of police have been injured—and several murdered,” President Trump said today. “Reckless politicians have defamed our law enforcement heroes as the enemy . . . and even call them an ‘invading army.’”

**So today, the President** gathered a group of Americans at the White House to tell stories about our police that we almost never hear from the corporate mass media:
* Battling substance abuse since the age of 11, Kenneth Bearden has suffered over 30 overdoses. Police officers had to help [**revive him more than a dozen times**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95be1de1d2&e=3ee4985eea). Today, Kenneth is 6 years sober. “My son would not have his father today if it wasn’t for [those] police officers.”

* Spencer Bohan, a non-verbal child with autism, "doesn't really have a sense of danger—so when he goes missing, it's like life or death," his mother Sara said. When he climbed out of his bedroom window and went missing, the Roanoke County Police came and [**found Spencer within 12 minutes**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=533e3425b7&e=3ee4985eea) of searching.

* Pastor Perry Cleek’s church, Lighthouse Baptist in Tennessee, chose to give $1,000 to every member of the town's police department. "The voice of small-town America is seldom heard . . . I think [**small towns all over America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd2f9a0ac5&e=3ee4985eea) feel like we do,” Pastor Cleek said.

**Last year** , 89 U.S. law enforcement officers were killed in the line of duty. Today, there are direct, often fatal consequences for residents of American cities whose leaders turn their backs on policing. Last month, there were 205 shootings in New York City—the most violent June for the city since 1996. In Chicago, between just Friday night and Sunday, 64 people were shot, 11 of whom died. Six teenagers were among those lost.

**President Trump** signed an executive order last month on [**Safe Policing for Safe Communities**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a23aa6e64&e=3ee4985eea), which incentivizes law enforcement agencies to adopt best practices in the use of force and other areas. Rather than defund police departments, these reforms will help officers share information and build better relationships with their communities.

**“I can assure you** that while some are talking about defunding the police, under this President and this Administration, we’re going to defend the police,” Vice President Mike Pence said today. “We’re going to back the blue.”

🎬 [President Trump: Our police officers aren’t the enemy—they’re heroes.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c809ca4f35&e=3ee4985eea)

**FULL VIDEO** : [President Trump hears stories about America’s brave officers ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26a5e738f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump holds a roundtable on the impact of law enforcement |** July 13, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92b21a7a16&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eb2e1b6c6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8fb417b6c0)
---

---

body:

Joe Biden has turned his campaign platform over to Bernie Sanders and Joe would rather hide out in his basement than face the voters. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NDQ4NDES1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDk5NTM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0
And my work is getting noticed.

A group of former "Never Trump" consultants have started running attack ads against me because I’ve had the audacity to point out that Joe Biden is too confused to lead. Why are they coming after me? Because they know that my attacks against Joe Biden can help President Trump win four more years. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NDQ4NDES1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDk5NTM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter, let’s be real. A lot of Republicans would see these attacks from the Never Trumpers and back down. After all, it’s easier to just be quiet and not fight back.

But I’ve decided to stand up to the mob. And I want you to join me. Want to make the “Never Trump” activists mad?
Help me run more attack ads against Joe Biden. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5NDQ4NDES1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDk5NTM1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Your contribution to this fund will help me run more ads to tell voters the truth about Joe Biden. I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 today to launch more ads exposing Joe Biden for being soft on China and unable to stand up to the liberal mob

clean_body: A group of former “Republican” consultants called the Lincoln Project has started running attack ads against me because I’ve had the audacity to point out that Joe Biden is too confused to lead. This group is led by a lobbyist who signed a $350,000 contract to lobby for Vladimir Putin and now the group is running attack ads against me.Click here to unsubscribe Peter, I am used to getting attacked by the mainstream media and the Left. But this is something new. I’ve been running ads in swing states to make sure voters know that a vote for Joe Biden is a vote for chaos, crime, and open borders. Joe Biden has turned his campaign platform over to Bernie Sanders and Joe would rather hide out in his basement than face the voters. And my work is getting noticed. A group of former "Never Trump" consultants have started running attack ads against me because I’ve had the audacity to point out that Joe Biden is too confused to lead. Why are they coming after me? Because they know that my attacks against Joe Biden can help President Trump win four more years. Peter, let’s be real. A lot of Republicans would see these attacks from the Never Trumpers and back down. After all, it’s easier to just be quiet and not fight back. But I’ve decided to stand up to the mob. And I want you to join me. Want to make the “Never Trump” activists mad? Help me run more attack ads against Joe Biden. I’ve launched the “Stand For Freedom” fund where we can fight back. Your contribution to this fund will help me run more ads to tell voters the truth about Joe Biden. I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 today to launch more ads exposing Joe Biden for being soft on China and unable to stand up to the liberal mob Will you help me tell voters the truth about Joe Biden? | CNN just reported that the White House is **again** sidelining and trying to discredit Dr. Anthony Fauci.

Trump pulled the United States out of the World Health Organization, downplayed the pandemic every step of the way, _and now -- once again -- is threatening Dr. Fauci_.

We're not surprised. **We 're disgusted**.

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7c09/4bd7760e/5fe6b9d2/77a94cd1/421407846/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci")
Dr. Fauci has served six Presidential Administrations and devoted his life to public service. He put his career on the line to save lives -- we have no doubt _that things would be much worse had Dr. Fauci not spoken truth to power._

[We can't let Trump FIRE Dr. Fauci because he has a petty vendetta against America's Doctor -- Click here and add your name to stand with Dr. Fauci!](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7c09/4bd7760e/5fe6b9d2/77a94cd0/421407846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+We+canrsquot+let+Trump+FIRE+Dr+Fauci+bec&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7c09/4bd7760e/5fe6b9d2/77a94cda/421407846/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200713_3MAT_none_RESND_2_savefauci")** to make a donation.
